description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
A portable, refuelable saw that runs on CHOOH2. Lasts about 2-3 hours on one tank.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-1 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are removed by a BODY stat of 7 or higher (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab)..

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-1 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are removed by a BODY stat of 7 or higher (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab)..

An absolutely insane scav concoction - its closest point of comparison is a blunderbuss, except the shrapnel cannon can only fire specially-made @UUID[Compendium.night-city-gang-and-corp-mook-pack.NCGangsnCorpsItems22.Item.0CDThubxOXNOmQtY]{shredder ammo}, and is the only gun capable of doing so.

It counts as a Very Heavy weapon for purposes of crits, critting on 5s as well as 6s if that homebrew adjustment is being used.

The Shrapenl Cannon is a poor quality weapon. When it jams, it explodes, becoming destroyed beyond repair and inflicting its damage exclusively to the holder.

A jumbo-sized shotgun shell, loaded with sharp metal bits instead of buckshot. This comes at the cost of gradually destroying the weapon it's fired from, but scavs don't tend to care about consequences.

Can only be fired from a shrapnel cannon.

Functions as the unholy combination of armor piercing and expansive ammunition, fired with the AoE of a shotgun shell. Increases the shell damage to 4d6. Doubles ablation to armor, and when you inflict a critical injury using this ammunition, the victim suffers the Foreign Object critical injury in addition to any other injuries rolled. Bonus damage is still only dealt once.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 5/Org Boss - High-level named threats who hold significant hard power, in charge of leading the various orgs found around NC.

Gang-Wide Ability - Untamed Savagery: On a successful melee crit, scavs always dismember a hand, arm, or leg, in place of any other result.

Ability - Bloody Mess: critical injuries inflicted by a butcher wielding a weapon which deals 4d6 damage or more inflict 10 damage instead of 5.

Butchers are the cold and calculated leaders of scav psychogangs. They still look like you or me, but don't be fooled - they're inhuman even by scav standards, they just have the talents and presence of mind not to go insane. A lot start out as corpos, living the Bateman lifestyle until they just can't take it anymore. Suddenly, all those resources go to other uses.
